sources.name: OpenAI models documentation
sources.notes: Canonical OpenAI model docs for API model capabilities and lifecycle.

sources.name: Anthropic models overview
sources.notes: Canonical Anthropic docs for Claude model families and lifecycle.

sources.name: Google Gemini models
sources.notes: Canonical Gemini API docs for model names, context windows, and model status.

sources.name: Mistral models documentation
sources.notes: Canonical Mistral docs for API model families and recommended use cases.

sources.name: DeepSeek API pricing and model docs
sources.notes: DeepSeek pricing/docs page currently doubles as the most stable public API model reference.

sources.name: Qwen pricing and model reference
sources.notes: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio model directory is the preferred Qwen metadata source when available.

sources.name: Moonshot platform docs
sources.notes: Moonshot platform docs and pricing pages are the canonical public API references.

sources.name: MiniMax pricing and model docs
sources.notes: MiniMax public developer docs currently expose model metadata mainly through pricing and API docs.

sources.name: Zhipu model overview
sources.notes: Canonical Zhipu docs for model families and modality separation.

sources.name: Hugging Face model cards
sources.notes: Use for open-weight models only. Not canonical for proprietary hosted APIs.
